name: Magikey Maftea
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鍵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－マフテア
desc: Fusion Summon 1 "Magikey" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material, OR Ritual Summon 1 "Magikey" Ritual Monster from your hand, by Tributing monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal or exceed its Level. If you control a Normal Monster, you can also send 1 Normal Monster from your Deck to the GY as material or Tribute.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 "Magikey" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material, OR Ritual Summon 1 "Magikey" Ritual Monster from your hand, by Tributing monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal or exceed its Level. If you control a Normal Monster, you can also send 1 Normal Monster from your Deck to the GY as material or Tribute.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard for Ritual Summon
Uses cards in the player's Deck as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
